name: v0-5-0
title: JarvOS v0.5.0 autonomy install profile
description: Portable profile for non-clawd hosts that enables @jarvos/coding orchestration and shared-brain continuity.

boundary.principle: Profiles for non-clawd hosts should keep coding and continuity as runtime boundaries, not mutable state.
boundary.taskAuthority: Paperclip remains the live task/state authority. Runtime agents read/write execution state through shared-brain continuity pointers.

skills.name: coding
skills.role: Expose @jarvos/coding with runTakeIssueToDone in the assistant/runtime surface.
guardrails: Keep coding execution evidence-backed and routed through Paperclip issue state.
Use runTakeIssueToDone through the portable host adapter contract.
Preserve existing tracker ownership and do not override Paperclip status.
Keep continuity checkpoints in the shared jarvos_session_state surface.

skills.name: agent-context
skills.role: Register shared-brain MCP continuity seam under jarvos_session_state tools.
guardrails: Keep session state file-backed and keyed by stable session identifiers.
Read live artifact pointers before mutating execution artifacts.
Report continuity health and failures through existing profile doctor checks.
Do not treat local session artifacts as the primary source of truth.
